name: stock-market-advisor
description: A provider-neutral, evidence-first stock research and portfolio risk assistant.

scripts.validate:private: node src/cli.js validate --holdings data/private/holdings.json --theses data/private/theses.json --market data/private/market-snapshot.json --policy data/private/policy.json
scripts.risk:private: node src/cli.js risk --holdings data/private/holdings.json --theses data/private/theses.json --market data/private/market-snapshot.json --policy data/private/policy.json
scripts.report:private: node src/cli.js report --holdings data/private/holdings.json --theses data/private/theses.json --market data/private/market-snapshot.json --policy data/private/policy.json
